name: GrokSearch
description: OpenClaw native plugin bundle for GrokSearch MCP-backed web_search, web_fetch, and explicit GrokSearch tools over a shared remote MCP endpoint.
author: Codex

disclosures: This skill sends queries and the configured bearer token to the configured remote GrokSearch MCP endpoint.
This bundle includes a native OpenClaw plugin entry with a pure-JS MCP runtime for OpenClaw provider and tool registration.
An optional bundled Python diagnostic script is included for local troubleshooting, but the plugin runtime does not execute local child processes.
Prefer configuring plugins.entries.grok-search.config instead of copying secrets into a local .env file.
The bundled installer copies local runtime files from this bundle and does not download remote code or modify other installed skills.
If you point GROKSEARCH_MCP_BASE_URL or GROKSEARCH_MCP_URL at an untrusted host, that host can see your queries and token.
